description: Letter (tadhkira) from ּḤassūn b. Yiṣḥaq, probably to Mūsā b. Yaḥyā al-Majjānī, probably from Alexandria. Dating: ca. 1030 (Gil). The writer lists merchandises and products, including a stone that he sent to sell in the Maghrib. The addressee is probably in Mahdiyya and Ḥassūn includes a list of things he asks Mūsā to do for him when he arrives in Qayrawān. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #219) VMR
